channel.title: Housing Market on WithinTrend — Trending Topics & Guides
channel.description: Recent content in Housing Market on WithinTrend — Trending Topics & Guides

item.title: Housing Market Predictions for Spring 2026: What Buyers and Sellers Need to Know
item.description: An analysis of the spring 2026 housing market with predictions for prices, inventory, mortgage rates, and strategies for both buyers and sellers.

item.title: Renting vs Buying in 2026: What Makes More Sense?
item.description: Renting vs buying a home in 2026 — a realistic comparison of costs, flexibility, and long-term wealth building to help you make the right decision.
